

//FxSentryTransactionSourceQueryTests
using IntegriteCBPFX.App.Features.Verification;
using IntegriteCBPFX.Tests.TestSupport;
using Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.Abstractions;
using Microsoft.Extensions.Options;
using Xunit;

namespace IntegriteCBPFX.Tests.Features.Verification;

/// <summary>
/// Lecture de la vue FXSentry (Dapper) sur SQLite : filtrage par plage de TRADE_DATE et mapping.
/// </summary>
public sealed class FxSentryTransactionSourceQueryTests : IDisposable
{
    private readonly SqliteFxSentryViewDatabase _db = new();
    private readonly FxSentryTransactionSource _source;

    public FxSentryTransactionSourceQueryTests()
        => _source = new FxSentryTransactionSource(_db, Options.Create(new FxSentryOptions()), NullLogger<FxSentryTransactionSource>.Instance);

    public void Dispose() => _db.Dispose();

    [Fact]
    public async Task GetTransactionsAsync_Returns_Only_Rows_Within_TradeDate_Range()
    {
        // Arrange — une ligne par jour autour de la plage.
        _db.InsertRow("CR-13", tradeDate: 20260613);
        _db.InsertRow("CR-14", tradeDate: 20260614);
        _db.InsertRow("CR-15", tradeDate: 20260615);
        _db.InsertRow("CR-16", tradeDate: 20260616);

        // Act — plage 14→15 (les bornes 13 et 16 sont exclues).
        var range = new VerificationDateRange(new DateOnly(2026, 6, 14), new DateOnly(2026, 6, 15));
        var result = await _source.GetTransactionsAsync(range, CancellationToken.None);

        // Assert
        Assert.Equal(["CR-14", "CR-15"], result.Select(t => t.CustRef).OrderBy(x => x, StringComparer.Ordinal));
    }

    [Fact]
    public async Task GetTransactionsAsync_Maps_Row_To_Domain()
    {
        // Arrange
        _db.InsertRow("CR-1", tradeDate: 20260615, tradeNumber: "TN-1", crossFlipped: true);

        // Act
        var range = new VerificationDateRange(new DateOnly(2026, 6, 15), new DateOnly(2026, 6, 15));
        var tx = Assert.Single(await _source.GetTransactionsAsync(range, CancellationToken.None));

        // Assert — champs copiés, bit→bool, INT yyyyMMdd→DateOnly.
        Assert.Equal("CR-1", tx.CustRef);
        Assert.Equal("TN-1", tx.TradeNumber);
        Assert.True(tx.CrossFlipped);
        Assert.Equal(new DateOnly(2026, 6, 15), tx.TradeDate);
    }

    [Fact]
    public async Task GetTransactionsAsync_Returns_Empty_When_No_Row_In_Range()
    {
        // Arrange — seule ligne hors plage.
        _db.InsertRow("CR-1", tradeDate: 20260601);

        // Act
        var range = new VerificationDateRange(new DateOnly(2026, 6, 14), new DateOnly(2026, 6, 15));
        var result = await _source.GetTransactionsAsync(range, CancellationToken.None);

        // Assert
        Assert.Empty(result);
    }
}

//end FxSentryTransactionSourceQueryTests

//FxSentryMappingTests
using IntegriteCBPFX.App.Features.Verification;
using Xunit;

namespace IntegriteCBPFX.Tests.Features.Verification;

public sealed class FxSentryMappingTests
{
    [Theory]
    [InlineData(20261115, 2026, 11, 15)]
    [InlineData(20260501, 2026, 5, 1)]
    public void FromYyyymmdd_Parses_Int_Date(int value, int year, int month, int day)
    {
        // Arrange
        var expected = new DateOnly(year, month, day);

        // Act
        var actual = FxSentryTransactionSource.FromYyyymmdd(value);

        // Assert
        Assert.Equal(expected, actual);
    }

    [Theory]
    [InlineData(2026, 11, 15, 20261115)]
    [InlineData(2026, 5, 1, 20260501)]
    [InlineData(2026, 1, 1, 20260101)]
    [InlineData(2026, 12, 31, 20261231)]
    public void ToYyyymmdd_Formats_Date_As_Int(int year, int month, int day, int expected)
    {
        Assert.Equal(expected, FxSentryTransactionSource.ToYyyymmdd(new DateOnly(year, month, day)));
    }

    [Theory]
    [InlineData(20261115)]
    [InlineData(20260101)]
    public void ToYyyymmdd_Is_Inverse_Of_FromYyyymmdd(int yyyymmdd)
    {
        Assert.Equal(yyyymmdd, FxSentryTransactionSource.ToYyyymmdd(FxSentryTransactionSource.FromYyyymmdd(yyyymmdd)));
    }

    [Fact]
    public void Map_Converts_Int_Dates_And_Copies_Fields()
    {
        // Arrange
        var row = new FxSentryRow
        {
            CustRef = "T1",
            TradeNumber = "FX1",
            ActiveTradeStatus = 1,
            CrossBaseCode = "USD",
            CrossCurrencyCode = "CAD",
            CrossFlipped = true,
            BuyCurrency = "CAD",
            SellCurrency = "USD",
            SetCurrency = "USD",
            UserId = "marc.andre",
            CustomerCode = "BIOVEPHAR",
            OriginalMaster = 295,
            Remark = "x",
            FxRate = 1.355555m,
            FxSpread = 0.000162m,
            ValueDate = 20260501,
            TradeDate = 20260430,
            BuyAmount = 4065m,
            SellAmount = 3000m,
        };

        // Act
        var tx = FxSentryTransactionSource.Map(row);

        // Assert
        Assert.Equal(new DateOnly(2026, 5, 1), tx.ValueDate);
        Assert.Equal(new DateOnly(2026, 4, 30), tx.TradeDate);
        Assert.True(tx.CrossFlipped);
        Assert.Equal("T1", tx.CustRef);
        Assert.Equal("FX1", tx.TradeNumber);
        Assert.Equal("USD", tx.CrossBaseCode);
        Assert.Equal(3000m, tx.SellAmount);
        Assert.Equal(1.355555m, tx.FxRate);
    }
}

//end FxSentryMappingTests

//RunVerificationResultTests
using IntegriteCBPFX.App.Features.Verification;
using IntegriteCBPFX.SharedKernel.Verification;
using Xunit;

namespace IntegriteCBPFX.Tests.Features.Verification;

/// <summary>Résultat synthétique du run : drapeaux Succeeded / HasAnomalies et projection depuis le run.</summary>
public sealed class RunVerificationResultTests
{
    [Theory]
    [InlineData(VerificationStatus.Completed, true)]
    [InlineData(VerificationStatus.Failed, false)]
    [InlineData(VerificationStatus.Running, false)]
    public void Succeeded_Is_True_Only_When_Completed(VerificationStatus status, bool expected)
    {
        var result = new RunVerificationResult { RunId = Guid.NewGuid(), Status = status };

        Assert.Equal(expected, result.Succeeded);
    }

    [Theory]
    [InlineData(0, false)]
    [InlineData(1, true)]
    [InlineData(5, true)]
    public void HasAnomalies_Reflects_Count(int anomalyCount, bool expected)
    {
        var result = new RunVerificationResult
        {
            RunId = Guid.NewGuid(),
            Status = VerificationStatus.Completed,
            AnomalyCount = anomalyCount,
        };

        Assert.Equal(expected, result.HasAnomalies);
    }

    [Fact]
    public void FromRun_Copies_Run_Fields()
    {
        // Arrange
        var now = new DateTimeOffset(2026, 6, 15, 22, 0, 0, TimeSpan.Zero);
        var run = VerificationRun.Start(Guid.NewGuid(), new DateOnly(2026, 6, 15), now);
        run.Complete(now.AddMinutes(1), cbpCount: 7, fxCount: 9, anomalyCount: 2);

        // Act
        var result = RunVerificationResult.FromRun(run);

        // Assert
        Assert.Equal(run.Id, result.RunId);
        Assert.Equal(VerificationStatus.Completed, result.Status);
        Assert.Equal(7, result.CbpTransactionCount);
        Assert.Equal(9, result.FxTransactionCount);
        Assert.Equal(2, result.AnomalyCount);
        Assert.True(result.Succeeded);
        Assert.True(result.HasAnomalies);
    }
}

//end RunVerificationResultTests

//RunVerificationHandlerTests
using IntegriteCBPFX.App.Features.Verification;
using IntegriteCBPFX.SharedKernel.Anomalies;
using IntegriteCBPFX.SharedKernel.Comparison;
using IntegriteCBPFX.SharedKernel.Transactions;
using IntegriteCBPFX.SharedKernel.Verification;
using IntegriteCBPFX.Tests.TestSupport;
using Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.Abstractions;
using NSubstitute;
using Xunit;

namespace IntegriteCBPFX.Tests.Features.Verification;

public sealed class RunVerificationHandlerTests
{
    private readonly ICbpTransactionSource _cbpSource = Substitute.For<ICbpTransactionSource>();
    private readonly IFxSentryTransactionSource _fxSource = Substitute.For<IFxSentryTransactionSource>();
    private readonly IVerificationStore _store = Substitute.For<IVerificationStore>();
    private readonly INotifier _notifier = Substitute.For<INotifier>();
    private readonly FixedClock _clock = new(new DateTimeOffset(2026, 5, 4, 8, 0, 0, TimeSpan.Zero));

    private RunVerificationHandler CreateHandler() => new(
        _cbpSource,
        _fxSource,
        new VerificationEngine(new TransactionComparer()),
        _store,
        _notifier,
        _clock,
        NullLogger<RunVerificationHandler>.Instance);

    private void GivenSources(IReadOnlyCollection<CbpTransaction> cbp, IReadOnlyCollection<FxSentryTransaction> fx)
    {
        _cbpSource.GetTransactionsAsync(Arg.Any<VerificationDateRange>(), Arg.Any<CancellationToken>()).Returns(cbp);
        _fxSource.GetTransactionsAsync(Arg.Any<VerificationDateRange>(), Arg.Any<CancellationToken>()).Returns(fx);
    }

    [Theory]
    [InlineData(VerificationMode.Veille, "2026-05-03", "2026-05-04")]
    [InlineData(VerificationMode.JourneeCourante, "2026-05-04", "2026-05-04")]
    public void ResolveRange_Maps_Mode_To_Trade_Date_Range(VerificationMode mode, string from, string to)
    {
        // Arrange
        var today = new DateOnly(2026, 5, 4);

        // Act
        var range = RunVerificationHandler.ResolveRange(mode, today);

        // Assert
        Assert.Equal(DateOnly.Parse(from), range.FromTradeDate);
        Assert.Equal(DateOnly.Parse(to), range.ToTradeDate);
    }

    [Fact]
    public void ResolveRange_Throws_On_Unknown_Mode()
    {
        Assert.Throws<ArgumentOutOfRangeException>(
            () => RunVerificationHandler.ResolveRange((VerificationMode)999, new DateOnly(2026, 5, 4)));
    }

    [Fact]
    public void TopFieldsInError_Ranks_By_Frequency_Then_Name()
    {
        // Arrange — 'status' 3×, 'tradeRate' 1×, 'valueDate' 1× ; le code 1 est ignoré.
        var now = new DateTimeOffset(2026, 6, 15, 22, 0, 0, TimeSpan.Zero);
        var anomalies = new[]
        {
            AnomalyTransaction.FieldDifferences("c1", "f1", ["status", "tradeRate"], now),
            AnomalyTransaction.FieldDifferences("c2", "f2", ["status", "valueDate"], now),
            AnomalyTransaction.FieldDifferences("c3", "f3", ["status"], now),
            AnomalyTransaction.CbpNotInFxSentry("c4", now),
        };

        // Act
        var top = RunVerificationHandler.TopFieldsInError(anomalies);

        // Assert — compte décroissant, puis nom (égalité tradeRate/valueDate → ordre alphabétique).
        Assert.Equal(["status=3", "tradeRate=1", "valueDate=1"], top);
    }

    [Fact]
    public void TopFieldsInError_Empty_When_No_Field_Difference()
    {
        var now = new DateTimeOffset(2026, 6, 15, 22, 0, 0, TimeSpan.Zero);

        var top = RunVerificationHandler.TopFieldsInError([AnomalyTransaction.CbpNotInFxSentry("c1", now)]);

        Assert.Empty(top);
    }

    [Fact]
    public async Task Veille_Mode_Passes_J_Minus_1_To_J_To_Sources()
    {
        // Arrange
        GivenSources([], []);

        // Act
        await CreateHandler().HandleAsync(new RunVerificationCommand(VerificationMode.Veille), CancellationToken.None);

        // Assert
        await _cbpSource.Received(1).GetTransactionsAsync(
            Arg.Is<VerificationDateRange>(r => r.FromTradeDate == new DateOnly(2026, 5, 3) && r.ToTradeDate == new DateOnly(2026, 5, 4)),
            Arg.Any<CancellationToken>());
    }

    [Fact]
    public async Task When_Source_Unavailable_Then_Run_Failed_And_Nothing_Persisted_Or_Notified()
    {
        // Arrange — la source CBP est indisponible.
        _cbpSource.GetTransactionsAsync(Arg.Any<VerificationDateRange>(), Arg.Any<CancellationToken>())
            .Returns<IReadOnlyCollection<CbpTransaction>>(_ => throw new TransactionSourceUnavailableException(TransactionSource.Cbp, "API down"));

        // Act
        var result = await CreateHandler().HandleAsync(new RunVerificationCommand(VerificationMode.Veille), CancellationToken.None);

        // Assert
        Assert.Equal(VerificationStatus.Failed, result.Status);
        await _store.Received(1).SaveRunAsync(Arg.Is<VerificationRun>(r => r.Status == VerificationStatus.Failed), Arg.Any<CancellationToken>());
        await _store.DidNotReceive().AddAnomaliesAsync(Arg.Any<IReadOnlyCollection<AnomalyTransaction>>(), Arg.Any<CancellationToken>());
        await _notifier.DidNotReceive().NotifyAsync(Arg.Any<VerificationRun>(), Arg.Any<CancellationToken>());
    }

    [Fact]
    public async Task When_Anomalies_Then_Persisted_And_BackOffice_Notified()
    {
        // Arrange — CBP sans contrepartie FX => 1 anomalie (code 1).
        GivenSources([TransactionTestData.Cbp()], []);

        // Act
        var result = await CreateHandler().HandleAsync(new RunVerificationCommand(VerificationMode.Veille), CancellationToken.None);

        // Assert
        Assert.Equal(VerificationStatus.Completed, result.Status);
        Assert.Equal(1, result.AnomalyCount);
        await _store.Received(1).AddAnomaliesAsync(Arg.Is<IReadOnlyCollection<AnomalyTransaction>>(a => a.Count == 1), Arg.Any<CancellationToken>());
        await _notifier.Received(1).NotifyAsync(Arg.Any<VerificationRun>(), Arg.Any<CancellationToken>());
    }

    [Fact]
    public async Task When_No_Anomaly_Then_No_Notification()
    {
        // Arrange — paire concordante => 0 anomalie.
        GivenSources([TransactionTestData.Cbp()], [TransactionTestData.Fx()]);

        // Act
        var result = await CreateHandler().HandleAsync(new RunVerificationCommand(VerificationMode.Veille), CancellationToken.None);

        // Assert
        Assert.Equal(VerificationStatus.Completed, result.Status);
        Assert.Equal(0, result.AnomalyCount);
        await _notifier.DidNotReceive().NotifyAsync(Arg.Any<VerificationRun>(), Arg.Any<CancellationToken>());
    }
}

//end RunVerificationHandlerTests

//SqliteFxSentryViewDatabase
using System.Data.Common;
using Dapper;
using IntegriteCBPFX.App.Common.Persistence;
using Microsoft.Data.Sqlite;

namespace IntegriteCBPFX.Tests.TestSupport;

/// <summary>
/// Base SQLite (fichiers temporaires) exposant la vue FXSentry
/// <c>integrite.CBP_V_INTEGRITE_F_FRONTOFFICE</c> via ATTACH, pour tester
/// <see cref="IntegriteCBPFX.App.Features.Verification.FxSentryTransactionSource"/> de bout en bout.
/// </summary>
public sealed class SqliteFxSentryViewDatabase : IAppDbConnectionFactory, IDisposable
{
    private readonly string _mainPath = Path.Combine(Path.GetTempPath(), $"fxmain_{Guid.NewGuid():N}.db");
    private readonly string _viewPath = Path.Combine(Path.GetTempPath(), $"fxview_{Guid.NewGuid():N}.db");

    public SqliteFxSentryViewDatabase()
    {
        using var connection = Open();
        using var command = connection.CreateCommand();
        command.CommandText =
            """
            CREATE TABLE integrite.CBP_V_INTEGRITE_F_FRONTOFFICE (
                CUST_REF            TEXT    NOT NULL,
                TRADE_NUMBER        TEXT    NOT NULL,
                ACTIVE_TRADE_STATUS INTEGER NOT NULL,
                CROSS_BASE_CODE     TEXT    NOT NULL,
                CROSS_CURRENCY_CODE TEXT    NOT NULL,
                CROSS_FLIPPED       INTEGER NOT NULL,
                BUY_CURRENCY        TEXT    NOT NULL,
                SELL_CURRENCY       TEXT    NOT NULL,
                SET_CURRENCY        TEXT    NOT NULL,
                USER_ID             TEXT    NULL,
                CUSTOMER_CODE       TEXT    NOT NULL,
                ORIGINAL_MASTER     INTEGER NOT NULL,
                REMARK              TEXT    NULL,
                FX_RATE             REAL    NOT NULL,
                FX_SPREAD           REAL    NOT NULL,
                VALUE_DATE          INTEGER NOT NULL,
                TRADE_DATE          INTEGER NOT NULL,
                BUY_AMOUNT          REAL    NOT NULL,
                SELL_AMOUNT         REAL    NOT NULL
            );
            """;
        command.ExecuteNonQuery();
    }

    /// <summary>Insère une ligne de vue (valeurs par défaut raisonnables, clés/dates paramétrables).</summary>
    public void InsertRow(string custRef, int tradeDate, string tradeNumber = "TN", bool crossFlipped = false, int valueDate = 20260615)
    {
        using var connection = Open();
        connection.Execute(
            """
            INSERT INTO integrite.CBP_V_INTEGRITE_F_FRONTOFFICE
                (CUST_REF, TRADE_NUMBER, ACTIVE_TRADE_STATUS, CROSS_BASE_CODE, CROSS_CURRENCY_CODE, CROSS_FLIPPED,
                 BUY_CURRENCY, SELL_CURRENCY, SET_CURRENCY, USER_ID, CUSTOMER_CODE, ORIGINAL_MASTER, REMARK,
                 FX_RATE, FX_SPREAD, VALUE_DATE, TRADE_DATE, BUY_AMOUNT, SELL_AMOUNT)
            VALUES
                (@CustRef, @TradeNumber, 1, 'USD', 'CAD', @CrossFlipped,
                 'CAD', 'USD', 'USD', 'user', 'CUST', 295, 'remark',
                 1.35, 0.0001, @ValueDate, @TradeDate, 4065, 3000);
            """,
            new
            {
                CustRef = custRef,
                TradeNumber = tradeNumber,
                CrossFlipped = crossFlipped ? 1 : 0,
                ValueDate = valueDate,
                TradeDate = tradeDate,
            });
    }

    public DbConnection Create() => Open();

    private SqliteConnection Open()
    {
        var connection = new SqliteConnection($"Data Source={_mainPath};Pooling=False");
        connection.Open();
        using var attach = connection.CreateCommand();
        attach.CommandText = $"ATTACH DATABASE '{_viewPath.Replace('\\', '/')}' AS integrite;";
        attach.ExecuteNonQuery();
        return connection;
    }

    public void Dispose()
    {
        TryDelete(_mainPath);
        TryDelete(_viewPath);

        static void TryDelete(string path)
        {
            try
            {
                if (File.Exists(path))
                {
                    File.Delete(path);
                }
            }
            catch (IOException)
            {
                // Fichier temporaire encore verrouillé : sans gravité pour les tests.
            }
        }
    }
}

//end SqliteFxSentryViewDatabase

//FxSentryTransactionSource
using Dapper;
using IntegriteCBPFX.App.Common.Persistence;
using IntegriteCBPFX.SharedKernel.Transactions;
using Microsoft.Data.SqlClient;
using Microsoft.Extensions.Logging;

namespace IntegriteCBPFX.App.Features.Verification;

/// <summary>Ligne brute de la vue FXSentry (matérialisée par Dapper). Dates en INT yyyyMMdd.</summary>
public sealed class FxSentryRow
{
    public string CustRef { get; set; } = string.Empty;
    public string TradeNumber { get; set; } = string.Empty;
    public int ActiveTradeStatus { get; set; }
    public string CrossBaseCode { get; set; } = string.Empty;
    public string CrossCurrencyCode { get; set; } = string.Empty;
    public bool CrossFlipped { get; set; }
    public string BuyCurrency { get; set; } = string.Empty;
    public string SellCurrency { get; set; } = string.Empty;
    public string SetCurrency { get; set; } = string.Empty;
    public string? UserId { get; set; }
    public string CustomerCode { get; set; } = string.Empty;
    public int OriginalMaster { get; set; }
    public string? Remark { get; set; }
    public decimal FxRate { get; set; }
    public decimal FxSpread { get; set; }
    public int ValueDate { get; set; }
    public int TradeDate { get; set; }
    public decimal BuyAmount { get; set; }
    public decimal SellAmount { get; set; }
}

/// <summary>
/// Adapter FXSentry (ResultSet B) : lit la vue (Dapper) filtrée sur la plage de TRADE_DATE.
/// Toute indisponibilité SQL est traduite en <see cref="TransactionSourceUnavailableException"/>.
/// </summary>
public sealed class FxSentryTransactionSource(
    IAppDbConnectionFactory connectionFactory,
    ILogger<FxSentryTransactionSource> logger) : IFxSentryTransactionSource
{
    // Requête CONSTANTE : aucun élément n'est concaténé/interpolé.
    // - Le nom de la vue (integrite.CBP_V_INTEGRITE_F_FRONTOFFICE) est figé ici : la renommer/déplacer
    //   = modifier cette constante (cf. db/scripts/0002 et db/README.md).
    // - Les alias DOIVENT correspondre aux propriétés de FxSentryRow (couvert par les tests de mapping).
    // - Seule la plage de dates varie, via les paramètres Dapper @FromTradeDate / @ToTradeDate.
    private const string Sql =
        """
        SELECT CUST_REF AS CustRef,
               TRADE_NUMBER AS TradeNumber,
               ACTIVE_TRADE_STATUS AS ActiveTradeStatus,
               CROSS_BASE_CODE AS CrossBaseCode,
               CROSS_CURRENCY_CODE AS CrossCurrencyCode,
               CROSS_FLIPPED AS CrossFlipped,
               BUY_CURRENCY AS BuyCurrency,
               SELL_CURRENCY AS SellCurrency,
               SET_CURRENCY AS SetCurrency,
               USER_ID AS UserId,
               CUSTOMER_CODE AS CustomerCode,
               ORIGINAL_MASTER AS OriginalMaster,
               REMARK AS Remark,
               FX_RATE AS FxRate,
               FX_SPREAD AS FxSpread,
               VALUE_DATE AS ValueDate,
               TRADE_DATE AS TradeDate,
               BUY_AMOUNT AS BuyAmount,
               SELL_AMOUNT AS SellAmount
        FROM integrite.CBP_V_INTEGRITE_F_FRONTOFFICE
        WHERE TRADE_DATE BETWEEN @FromTradeDate AND @ToTradeDate;
        """;

    public async Task<IReadOnlyCollection<FxSentryTransaction>> GetTransactionsAsync(VerificationDateRange range, CancellationToken cancellationToken)
    {
        ArgumentNullException.ThrowIfNull(range);

        var fromTradeDate = ToYyyymmdd(range.FromTradeDate);
        var toTradeDate = ToYyyymmdd(range.ToTradeDate);

        try
        {
            logger.LogDebug("Lecture de la vue FXSentry [{From}..{To}].", fromTradeDate, toTradeDate);

            using var connection = connectionFactory.Create();
            var rows = await connection.QueryAsync<FxSentryRow>(
                new CommandDefinition(Sql, new { FromTradeDate = fromTradeDate, ToTradeDate = toTradeDate }, cancellationToken: cancellationToken));

            return rows.Select(Map).ToArray();
        }
        catch (SqlException ex)
        {
            throw new TransactionSourceUnavailableException(TransactionSource.FxSentry, "Base FXSentry inaccessible.", ex);
        }
    }

    /// <summary>Projette une ligne de vue vers le modèle de domaine (conversion des dates INT).</summary>
    public static FxSentryTransaction Map(FxSentryRow row)
    {
        ArgumentNullException.ThrowIfNull(row);
        return new FxSentryTransaction
        {
            CustRef = row.CustRef,
            TradeNumber = row.TradeNumber,
            ActiveTradeStatus = row.ActiveTradeStatus,
            CrossBaseCode = row.CrossBaseCode,
            CrossCurrencyCode = row.CrossCurrencyCode,
            CrossFlipped = row.CrossFlipped,
            BuyCurrency = row.BuyCurrency,
            SellCurrency = row.SellCurrency,
            SetCurrency = row.SetCurrency,
            UserId = row.UserId,
            CustomerCode = row.CustomerCode,
            OriginalMaster = row.OriginalMaster,
            Remark = row.Remark,
            FxRate = row.FxRate,
            FxSpread = row.FxSpread,
            ValueDate = FromYyyymmdd(row.ValueDate),
            TradeDate = FromYyyymmdd(row.TradeDate),
            BuyAmount = row.BuyAmount,
            SellAmount = row.SellAmount,
        };
    }

    public static int ToYyyymmdd(DateOnly date) => (date.Year * 10000) + (date.Month * 100) + date.Day;

    public static DateOnly FromYyyymmdd(int value) => new(value / 10000, value / 100 % 100, value % 100);
}

//end FxSentryTransactionSource

//FxSentryMappingTests
using IntegriteCBPFX.App.Features.Verification;
using Xunit;

namespace IntegriteCBPFX.Tests.Features.Verification;

public sealed class FxSentryMappingTests
{
    [Theory]
    [InlineData(20261115, 2026, 11, 15)]
    [InlineData(20260501, 2026, 5, 1)]
    public void FromYyyymmdd_Parses_Int_Date(int value, int year, int month, int day)
    {
        // Arrange
        var expected = new DateOnly(year, month, day);

        // Act
        var actual = FxSentryTransactionSource.FromYyyymmdd(value);

        // Assert
        Assert.Equal(expected, actual);
    }

    [Theory]
    [InlineData(2026, 11, 15, 20261115)]
    [InlineData(2026, 5, 1, 20260501)]
    [InlineData(2026, 1, 1, 20260101)]
    [InlineData(2026, 12, 31, 20261231)]
    public void ToYyyymmdd_Formats_Date_As_Int(int year, int month, int day, int expected)
    {
        Assert.Equal(expected, FxSentryTransactionSource.ToYyyymmdd(new DateOnly(year, month, day)));
    }

    [Theory]
    [InlineData(20261115)]
    [InlineData(20260101)]
    public void ToYyyymmdd_Is_Inverse_Of_FromYyyymmdd(int yyyymmdd)
    {
        Assert.Equal(yyyymmdd, FxSentryTransactionSource.ToYyyymmdd(FxSentryTransactionSource.FromYyyymmdd(yyyymmdd)));
    }

    [Fact]
    public void Map_Converts_Int_Dates_And_Copies_Fields()
    {
        // Arrange
        var row = new FxSentryRow
        {
            CustRef = "T1",
            TradeNumber = "FX1",
            ActiveTradeStatus = 1,
            CrossBaseCode = "USD",
            CrossCurrencyCode = "CAD",
            CrossFlipped = true,
            BuyCurrency = "CAD",
            SellCurrency = "USD",
            SetCurrency = "USD",
            UserId = "marc.andre",
            CustomerCode = "BIOVEPHAR",
            OriginalMaster = 295,
            Remark = "x",
            FxRate = 1.355555m,
            FxSpread = 0.000162m,
            ValueDate = 20260501,
            TradeDate = 20260430,
            BuyAmount = 4065m,
            SellAmount = 3000m,
        };

        // Act
        var tx = FxSentryTransactionSource.Map(row);

        // Assert
        Assert.Equal(new DateOnly(2026, 5, 1), tx.ValueDate);
        Assert.Equal(new DateOnly(2026, 4, 30), tx.TradeDate);
        Assert.True(tx.CrossFlipped);
        Assert.Equal("T1", tx.CustRef);
        Assert.Equal("FX1", tx.TradeNumber);
        Assert.Equal("USD", tx.CrossBaseCode);
        Assert.Equal(3000m, tx.SellAmount);
        Assert.Equal(1.355555m, tx.FxRate);
    }
}

//end FxSentryMappingTests

//FxSentryTransactionSourceQueryTests
using IntegriteCBPFX.App.Features.Verification;
using IntegriteCBPFX.Tests.TestSupport;
using Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.Abstractions;
using Xunit;

namespace IntegriteCBPFX.Tests.Features.Verification;

/// <summary>
/// Lecture de la vue FXSentry (Dapper) sur SQLite : filtrage par plage de TRADE_DATE et mapping.
/// </summary>
public sealed class FxSentryTransactionSourceQueryTests : IDisposable
{
    private readonly SqliteFxSentryViewDatabase _db = new();
    private readonly FxSentryTransactionSource _source;

    public FxSentryTransactionSourceQueryTests()
        => _source = new FxSentryTransactionSource(_db, NullLogger<FxSentryTransactionSource>.Instance);

    public void Dispose() => _db.Dispose();

    [Fact]
    public async Task GetTransactionsAsync_Returns_Only_Rows_Within_TradeDate_Range()
    {
        // Arrange — une ligne par jour autour de la plage.
        _db.InsertRow("CR-13", tradeDate: 20260613);
        _db.InsertRow("CR-14", tradeDate: 20260614);
        _db.InsertRow("CR-15", tradeDate: 20260615);
        _db.InsertRow("CR-16", tradeDate: 20260616);

        // Act — plage 14→15 (les bornes 13 et 16 sont exclues).
        var range = new VerificationDateRange(new DateOnly(2026, 6, 14), new DateOnly(2026, 6, 15));
        var result = await _source.GetTransactionsAsync(range, CancellationToken.None);

        // Assert
        Assert.Equal(["CR-14", "CR-15"], result.Select(t => t.CustRef).OrderBy(x => x, StringComparer.Ordinal));
    }

    [Fact]
    public async Task GetTransactionsAsync_Maps_Row_To_Domain()
    {
        // Arrange
        _db.InsertRow("CR-1", tradeDate: 20260615, tradeNumber: "TN-1", crossFlipped: true);

        // Act
        var range = new VerificationDateRange(new DateOnly(2026, 6, 15), new DateOnly(2026, 6, 15));
        var tx = Assert.Single(await _source.GetTransactionsAsync(range, CancellationToken.None));

        // Assert — champs copiés, bit→bool, INT yyyyMMdd→DateOnly.
        Assert.Equal("CR-1", tx.CustRef);
        Assert.Equal("TN-1", tx.TradeNumber);
        Assert.True(tx.CrossFlipped);
        Assert.Equal(new DateOnly(2026, 6, 15), tx.TradeDate);
    }

    [Fact]
    public async Task GetTransactionsAsync_Returns_Empty_When_No_Row_In_Range()
    {
        // Arrange — seule ligne hors plage.
        _db.InsertRow("CR-1", tradeDate: 20260601);

        // Act
        var range = new VerificationDateRange(new DateOnly(2026, 6, 14), new DateOnly(2026, 6, 15));
        var result = await _source.GetTransactionsAsync(range, CancellationToken.None);

        // Assert
        Assert.Empty(result);
    }
}

//end FxSentryTransactionSourceQueryTests

//

//end 

//

//end
